headline: Shortwave Radio Daily Briefing - Increased Solar Activity Expected
highlights: BBC World Service on 6.195 kHz reports strong signals across Europe and Africa
Voice of America relaying on 9.455 kHz showing excellent propagation to Asia-Pacific
China Radio International on 11.640 kHz maintains stable reception in Middle East regions
Deutsche Welle broadcasting on 13.790 kHz with improved clarity over Western Africa
changes: RFI French service temporarily shifted from 11.600 kHz to 11.615 kHz due to interference mitigation
Radio Romania International reduced power output on 5.990 kHz for maintenance through 2024-01-15
propagation_note: K-index at 4, expect F2 layer skip distances 800-1500 km. Morning hours optimal for long-distance propagation. Sunset terminator currently favorable for transatlantic reception.
